title: Fullstack Developer | AI Engineer (w/m/x)
company: BEKO Engineering & Informatik GmbH & Co KG
description:
Willkommen bei BEKO – Österreichs führendem Anbieter technischer Dienstleistungen. Seit über 50 Jahren arbeiten wir bei BEKO an modernen Lösungen und wegweisenden Zukunftsideen für Unternehmen jeder Branche und Größe. Mit einem bunten Team aus kreativen Köpfen und dem gebündelten Know\-how von IT\-Spezialist\*innen und Engineering\-Expert\*innen denken wir quer, weiter und voraus. Dabei glauben wir vor allem an eines: Fortschritt in allen Farben.  

  

Aber wir bei BEKO reden nicht nur von der Zukunft. Wir arbeiten daran. Vielleicht schon bald mit dir?


Wir 
**Fullstack Developer \| AI Engineer (w/m/x)**
==============================================


 Wien oder Graz
 Vollzeit
 ab sofort
Zur Verstärkung unseres Software Development Teams suchen wir einen Fullstack Developer / AI Engineer (m/w/x) \- eine sehr spannende Position, welche moderne Softwarelösungen mit innovativen KI\-Technologien verbindet. In dieser Rolle arbeitest du an anspruchsvollen Projekten im Bereich Digitalisierung und künstliche Intelligenz und gestaltest aktiv die technologische Zukunft unseres Unternehmens mit.


### **Aufgaben**


* Konzeption und Entwicklung von skalierbaren Softwarelösungen im Fullstack\-Bereich
* Design, Implementierung und Betrieb von KI\-basierten Anwendungen (z. B. RAG\-Systeme, agentische Workflows)
* Analyse fachlicher Anforderungen und Übersetzung in technische Architekturen sowie Deployment\-Strategien
* Integration von KI\-Services und Modellen in bestehende Systeme und IT\-Landschaften (inkl. APIs und Datenpipelines)
* Auswahl, Einsatz und Weiterentwicklung von Tools und Frameworks im Bereich AI/LLM (z. B. LangChain, Vektordatenbanken)
* Fachliche Begleitung des Teams als Sparringspartner sowie aktive Mitgestaltung des KI\-Einsatzes im Entwicklungsprozess
### **Profil**


* Sehr gute Kenntnisse in **.NET / C\#, Python und TypeScript (idealerweise Angular)**
* Erfahrung in der **Konzeption, Entwicklung und dem Deployment** skalierbarer Software\- und KI\-Lösungen
* Praxis in der Umsetzung von **KI\-basierten Anwendungen**, z. B. **RAG\-Systemen** und **agentischen Workflows**
* Erfahrung in der **Integration von KI\-Services und Modellen** in bestehende Systeme, APIs und Datenpipelines
* Gute Kenntnisse gängiger **AI\-/LLM\-Frameworks** wie **LangChain, LlamaIndex** oder vergleichbarer Technologien
* Verständnis für **Prompt Engineering, Kontextmanagement, Retrieval\-Strategien** sowie idealerweise für **Vektordatenbanken und Embedding\-Modelle**
* Erfahrung mit **AI\-Coding\-Tools** wie **GitHub Copilot, Codex oder Claude** sowie Interesse, deren Einsatz im Entwicklungsprozess aktiv voranzutreiben
* Idealerweise Know\-how in **Cloud\- und Hybrid\-Architekturen**, idealerweise mit **Azure AI Services, Azure AI Foundry oder IBM watsonx**
* Teamorientierte, seniorige Persönlichkeit mit Freude an **Sparring, Wissensaustausch und der Unterstützung weniger erfahrener KollegInnen**
### **Angebot**



Kostenlose Weiterbildung an der BEKO Akademie, individuelle Kurse und Seminare

Umfangreiches Gesundheitsangebot: Betriebsarzt und Betriebspsychologin, Impfaktionen, Wirbelsäulen\-Screening, uvm.

Sozialleistungen wie private Unfallversicherung oder diverse Betriebsratsförderungen

Offene Kommunikation und kurze Entscheidungswege auf allen Ebenen

Spannende Projekte für namhafte Unternehmen aus unterschiedlichen Branchen

Gute Erreichbarkeit der BEKO Offices sowie gratis Jobticket

Zeitlich und örtlich flexibles Arbeiten in deinem Home Office  

Workation: Ein Monat im Jahr von dort aus arbeiten, wo andere Urlaub machen

Erfolgreicher Start durch ein persönliches Onboarding\-Programm

Gut versorgt: Supermarkt und Restaurants in unmittelbarer Nähe der BEKO Offices. Kaffee, Snacks, frisches Obst und Erfrischungsgetränke werden in den BEKO Offices bereitgestellt.

Regelmäßige Mitarbeiterevents (z.B. After Works, Expertenabende, uvm.)

Vergünstigungen in Gastronomie und Handel

Kein All\-In\-Vertrag: aufgrund moderner Arbeitszeitmodelle kann flexibel Zeitausgleich konsumiert werden

**Vertrauensarbeitszeit mit 35h/Woche** (in Form einer einzelvertraglichen Vereinbarung)

Jobradl Bikeleasing – Dienstrad für umweltfreundliche Mobilität

Unterstützung beim Antrag des Ingenieur\-Titels

Das BEKO Sabbatical: Bezahlte Auszeit mit flexibler Planung

**Vertrauensarbeitszeit möglich** Arbeite eigenverantwortlich und flexibel – im Einklang mit deinem Team und deinen Aufgaben. Reduktion auf 35 Wochenstunden bei vollem Gehalt, individuell vereinbar.

Wir bieten ein Gehalt von mindestens **5\.000,\- € Brutto** auf Basis Vollzeit bei Erfüllung aller Anforderungen. Je nach konkreter Qualifikation und Erfahrung ist eine **Bereitschaft zur Überzahlung** gegeben.
**5\.000,\- €**

title: Senior AI Engineer (m/f/x)
description:
#### **Senior AI Engineer (m/f/x)**


Intact, the world’s leading provider of software solutions for the Testing, Inspection and Certification (TIC) industry, is looking for an AI Engineer to join our global team. With our products, we help ensure that organic really is organic, food is safe, fisheries are sustainable, and buildings don’t go up in flames.


Intact AI is our production\-grade AI system, used in real audit workflows where correctness, reliability, and traceability matter. The hard part isn’t shipping demos — it’s making LLM\-based systems reliable in complex, document\-heavy environments. If you’ve only worked with clean text inputs, this role will challenge you. We’re looking for a senior engineer who wants to own these systems end\-to\-end, from architecture to production.


Sounds good? Then apply now as our next:


ARE YOU READY?


You’ll be our first internal AI Engineer, taking ownership of Intact AI from the external team that built it. You shape architecture and operations from day one.


* Own \& Evolve: You take production AI systems end\-to\-end architecture, deployment, and operations
* Reliable LLM Systems: You design systems that make RAG and agent\-based workflows reliable under real\-world conditions: quality, hallucination control, structured outputs, latency, cost
* Retrieval \& Reasoning: You continuously improve retrieval and reasoning quality in complex, document\-heavy environments
* Evals \& Guardrails: You define and implement evaluation, monitoring, and guardrails for LLM systems
* Production Optimization: You optimize for latency, cost, and robustness in production
* Incident Ownership: You investigate production issues, fix them at the root, and continuously improve system reliability


ARE YOU THE ONE?


* You have a strong track record building and operating production systems — not just prototypes
* You drive systems end\-to\-end without close guidance
* You’ve taken ownership of production systems built by others: reading, understanding, and evolving unfamiliar codebases is something you’ve done before
* You’re comfortable working across multiple layers : data, models, APIs, and infrastructure
* You’ve built RAG pipelines in production: chunking, embeddings, retrieval, re\-ranking — and have opinions on what works and what doesn’t
* You’ve built agentic systems that handle multi\-step tasks reliably
* You measure LLM quality systematically: evals, regression tests, monitoring
* You think in systems, not just components
* You can structure ambiguous problems and turn them into working solutions
* You’re strong in Python; production experience on a major cloud platform (Azure preferred) is a plus
* Fluent English required; German a plus


WHY US?


* International environment with purpose: we help safeguard quality, safety, and sustainability worldwide
* Flexible working hours with flexitime and a home\-office option.
* Supportive team: open dialogue across all levels
* Great food options: many partner restaurants nearby offering employee discounts
* Easy to reach: whether by public transport or by car
* Fair compensation: starting at € 4,611 (38\.5h/week), with significant overpayment depending on seniority
* Start: ASAP

**We are looking forward to your application**
----------------------------------------------

Please email your application to: karriere@intact\-systems.com


Intact GmbH, Ms. Sabrina Weilbuchner, MSc; Parkring 6, 8403 Lebring, Austria


  
**Send Us Your Application.**
-----------------------------


We are looking forward to hearing from you and welcoming you to our team soon.


### **Katajon Nasseri Tabrizi**


Recruiter
Email: careers@intact\-systems.com

title: Prompt Writer - Remote
description:
**Job Title:** Voice Actors Prompt Writer


**Job Type:** Contractor


**Location:** Remote


**Job Summary:**


Join our customer team as a Voice Actors Prompt Writer and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of AI voice technology. In this expert\-level, fully remote position, you'll craft engaging and effective prompts that guide voice actors, fueling the next generation of AI agents. This is an exciting opportunity to blend creativity, technical accuracy, and linguistic expertise in a fast\-evolving field.


**Key Responsibilities:**


* Develop, write, and refine high\-quality prompts tailored for voice actor interpretation within AI agent projects.
* Collaborate closely with AI engineers, project managers, and voice actors to ensure clear, expressive, and purposeful scriptwriting.
* Research and analyze various voice acting styles to design prompts optimized for diverse character and emotion delivery.
* Iterate on prompt effectiveness based on feedback and performance metrics to hone the overall AI voice experience.
* Uphold best practices for voice prompt clarity, tone, and engagement across a wide range of scenarios.
* Document processes, revisions, and linguistic choices for knowledge sharing within the customer's team.
* Contribute to a creative, communicative, and results\-driven remote work culture.

**Required Skills and Qualifications:**


* Exceptional command of written and spoken English, with an ability to craft precise and lively scripts.
* Proven experience in scriptwriting for voice actors, audio production, or AI\-driven applications.
* Outstanding writing and editing skills with sharp attention to detail and narrative flow.
* Strong verbal communication and proactive collaboration abilities in remote, cross\-functional environments.
* Demonstrated initiative and adaptability in fast\-paced, iterative projects.
* Passion for AI technologies and their applications in natural language and voice.
* Ability to synthesize feedback to continuously improve script and prompt quality.

**Preferred Qualifications:**


* Background in linguistics, creative writing, journalism, or related fields.
* Experience working with AI or machine learning teams in content development.
* Familiarity with diverse voice acting genres or multilingual scripting.

title: AI Engineer (f/m/x)
description:
As a leading expert for Digital Platform Building and Customer Experience Innovation, NETCONOMY is shaping the digital leadership of its clients. We help brands to build flexible and scalable digital platforms, with top\-notch technologies by SAP, Google Cloud and Microsoft Azure. NETCONOMY has 20 years of experience and employs close to 500 professionals across Europe. By introducing and driving innovation initiatives around customer experience, we support clients on the road of expanding their core business in the digital world.
   

  

 Over the past 25 years, NETCONOMY has grown from a startup into a team of 450\+ experts across ten European locations. We believe in the power of agile and cross\-functional collaboration, bringing together people from diverse backgrounds to build outstanding digital solutions.
   

  

**YOUR JOB**
 As an
 **AI Engineer** 
 , you will play a crucial role in
 **driving innovation and implementing cutting\-edge Generative AI solutions and intelligent agentic systems** 
 . Join our dynamic team and contribute to the development of intelligent systems that solve complex problems and enhance our business capabilities.
   

  

**Your Job’s Key Responsibilities Are**
* Designing and implementing end\-to\-end Generative AI solutions, AI agents, and RAG (Retrieval\-Augmented Generation) pipelines to address business challenges and opportunities
* Collaborating with cross\-functional teams to understand requirements, providing technical expertise, and delivering scalable and robust AI solutions
* Conducting research and evaluation of emerging AI models, agentic frameworks, and development kits
* Working independently on Proof of Concepts (PoC) to validate and showcase the feasibility of proposed solutions
* Conducting direct client communication to understand their needs and tailor AI\-driven solutions accordingly


**Your Skills**
 Essential Skills:
   

  

* 3\+ years of experience in Applied AI or Machine Learning in the industry
* Proficiency in building Generative AI and Agentic applications at scale, with expertise in using agentic frameworks, vector databases, grounding, and other relevant concepts
* Direct experience or strong familiarity with agent development (e.g. LangGraph, Google Agent Development Kit (ADK), Agno)
* Proven experience in research and evaluation of emerging AI technologies, models, and frameworks
* Extensive knowledge of Cloud AI offerings on one of the Hyperscalers (GCP, AWS or Azure), including ready\-to\-use AI services, AutoML approaches, and custom model development
* Strong and assertive communication skills
* Passion for keeping up with industry trends and advancements in Generative AI and agentic systems


**Beneficial Skills**
* Hands\-on experience with the Google Cloud AI/ML stack (e.g., Vertex AI, Gemini Models, Vector Search)
* Experience with AI evaluation frameworks (e.g., RAGAs, LangSmith), writing integration tests, and establishing robust validation strategies for Generative AI and agentic applications
* Knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes
* Familiarity with CI/CD processes for MLOps/AIOps
* A/B testing expertise for AI models and applications


 OUR OFFER
   

  

 While we’re one company, each location has unique aspects and benefits. Here’s a glimpse of what to expect:
   

  

* Flexible Working Models: Early bird or night owl? Thanks to our flexible working models, you start your workday when and where it fits you best. Plus, our hybrid work option lets you choose whether you prefer working more from the office or from home.
* Career Development and Onboarding: Start your journey at NETCONOMY with a structured onboarding and mentoring phase and continue with individual training opportunities. Our People Enablement team will support you in finding the best solution for you!
* Company Summit: Exchange professional and personal experiences at our annual in\-house conference! One of the highlights of our company Summit is the vibrant networking environment it cultivates.
* Social Events: Join our colleagues and build new connections at our social events such as pizza evenings, sports activities, Christmas parties, or milestone celebrations.
* Snacks and Wellbeing: Fuel your productivity and taste buds with our monthly meal allowance and discounts at partner restaurants.
* Mobility Support: Choose eco\-friendly transportation! As we take our responsibility for the environment seriously, we support your climate\-friendly transportation costs.


 The actual salary depends on your qualifications and experience. What is also important to us is to pay our employees an internally comparable salary. For legal reasons, we need to disclose the minimum annual salary for full time employment as stated in the current collective IT agreement, which is € 55,356 gross / year for this position.

title: Senior AI Engineer - Post Business Solutions GmbH (w/m/d)
description:
**Who We Are**
 Experience the best of both worlds: Our business unit, Post Business Solutions, operates as a strong B2B Digital Services Provider within the secure corporate environment of Österreichische Post AG. Post Business Solutions is Austria's leading provider of B2B solutions in the areas of digitization, automation, and outsourcing of business processes in information management. We leverage our position of strength, consistently expand our market position, and also expand into neighboring markets. We pursue a clear mission: We aim to elevate the entire usage and management cycle of our customers' information and documents to a completely new level of performance.
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
* A dynamic and innovative work environment
* Opportunities to work on cutting\-edge technologies in AI, cloud, and hybrid infrastructure
* Professional development and certification support
* Flexible working hours and hybrid work options
* A collaborative and inclusive team culture
* Discounted holiday offers \& various shopping benefits
* Company health promotion \& free bank99 employee Account


**What You Will Work On**
* End\-to\-End AI Engineering: Design and develop production\-grade AI services using C\# and .NET, integrating them seamlessly into our B2B document and information service architectures.
* Intelligent Automation: Implement Azure AI solutions and agentic workflows to automate multi\-step business logic for our customers.
* Architectural Leadership: Shape advanced RAG architectures and LLM orchestration strategies across hybrid (cloud \+ on\-premise) environments.
* Quality \& Performance: Establish evaluation frameworks (e.g., RAGAS, DocVQA) to ensure high\-performance model output, security, and scalability.
* Team Excellence: Guide developers through code reviews and mentorship while collaborating with stakeholders to translate business needs into technical roadmaps.


**What You Bring With You**
* Background: 5\+ years of software engineering experience, ideally within regulated industries (e.g., finance, public sector, or logistics).
* AI Expertise: Proven track record in designing RAG architectures and agentic frameworks (e.g., Microsoft Agent Framework, Google Agent Development Kit), including familiarity with agents.md configurations and advanced prompting (e.g., CoT, Few\-Shot, ReAct, and Prompt Chaining).
* The .NET Stack: Expert\-level C\# and .NET skills, with hands\-on experience in Docker, Kubernetes, and the Azure AI ecosystem.
* Fluency in Python: Ability to work with data science notebooks, and leverage Python\-based AI tooling.
* Modern Protocols: Practical knowledge of standards like MCP and A2A communication patterns.
* Model Knowledge: Experience deploying Open Source models (e.g., Llama, Mistral, or Gemma).
* Education \& Certs: A technical degree (BSc/MSc) and relevant Microsoft AI certifications (e.g., Azure AI Engineer Associate).
* Languages: Minimum German B1 level for internal collaboration and fluent English skills.


 The minimum salary for a full\-time position is EUR 70,000 (gross annual salary all\-in). However, we are of course willing to provide overpayment based on prior qualifications and experience!
   

  

 Would you like to work in an innovative, modern unit of the Post? Then apply now!
   

  

 I look forward to receiving your application.
   

  

 Your recruiter Christian
   

  

 Information on data protection for applicants at Österreichische Post AG can be found here
company_industry: Transportation, Logistics, Supply Chain and Storage

title: AI Engineer (w/m/d).
description:
**Team Data Science. Wien. Vollzeit oder Teilzeit ab 30 Stunden.**
 Innovativ, gut ausgebildet und immer auf der Suche nach kreativen Lösungen. Das bedeutet Arbeiten in der IT von Helvetia. Auf Menschen, die technisch talentiert sind, gerne auch im Team Verantwortung übernehmen, warten hier ständig neue Herausforderungen. Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung –
 **\&Los.**
**Deine Verantwortung**
* Als Mitglied eines internationalen agilen Produktteams entwickelst, wartest und optimierst du Cloud\-Native Lösungen auf Basis von Containertechnologien und modernen Architekturparadigmen.
* Identifikation, Planung und Umsetzung von GenAI \& Data Science Use Cases entlang des analytischen Lifecycles \& moderner Softwareentwicklung
* Selbständige und länderübergreifende Organisation, Koordination und Projektarbeit
* Durch Sparring, Coaching und regelmäßigen Austausch förderst du den internen Wissensaufbau.


**Deine Qualifikation**
* Studium der Informatik oder eine vergleichbare Ausbildung
* Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung mit Python im Bereich AI / GenAI
* Kenntnisse mit der Cloud (AWS oder Azure) sowie mit Container Technologien (Docker) sind von Vorteil.
* Sehr gute Deutsch\- und Englischkenntnisse


**Das bringst du mit**
* Freude an einem aktiv gelebten Teamgeist
* Eigeninitiative und Motivation Neues zu lernen und sich weiterzuentwickeln


 Wien, 1\. Bezirk / Homeoffice
   

  

 Vollzeit
   

  

 Chancengleichheit
   

  

 Bei Helvetia zählen Qualifikation, Einzigartigkeit und Begeisterung. Chancengleichheit ist uns wichtig. Wir freuen uns über vielfältige Bewerbungen von Menschen jeden Geschlechtes, unterschiedlicher Herkunft, Altersgruppe oder Religion.
   

  

 Mit Berufserfahrung
   

  

 ab sofort möglich
   

  

 EUR 65\.000\* \*mit der Möglichkeit einer höheren Bezahlung bei entsprechender Qualifikation und Erfahrung
   

  

**Rafael Rastbichler** 
 Recruiting Experte \+43 (0\) 50 222 1232 und
 **Patrik Klein** 
 Recruiting Partner Mache den ersten Schritt und bewerbe dich ausschliesslich online. Wir berücksichtigen nur Direktbewerbungen.
   

  

**Arbeiten bei Helvetia**
 Das Team Helvetia ist gemeinsam da, wenn es drauf ankommt. Wir sind Menschen, auf die man sich verlassen kann. Die einander unterstützen und sich füreinander einsetzen. Die einander fordern und fördern. Die begeistern und sich begeistern lassen. So gestalten wir gemeinsam die Zukunft.
 **\&Los!**

title: Fullstack Developer | AI Engineer (w/m/x)
description:
Willkommen bei BEKO – Österreichs führendem Anbieter technischer Dienstleistungen. Seit über 50 Jahren arbeiten wir bei BEKO an modernen Lösungen und wegweisenden Zukunftsideen für Unternehmen jeder Branche und Größe. Mit einem bunten Team aus kreativen Köpfen und dem gebündelten Know\-How von IT\-Spezialisten und Engineering\-Expertinnen denken wir quer, weiter und voraus. Dabei glauben wir vor allem an eines: Fortschritt in allen Farben.
   

  

 Aber wir bei BEKO reden nicht nur von der Zukunft. Wir arbeiten daran. Vielleicht schon bald mit Ihnen?
   

  

 Aufgaben
   

  

* Konzeption und Entwicklung von skalierbaren Softwarelösungen im Fullstack\-Bereich
* Design, Implementierung und Betrieb von KI\-basierten Anwendungen (z. B. RAG\-Systeme, agentische Workflows)
* Analyse fachlicher Anforderungen und Übersetzung in technische Architekturen sowie Deployment\-Strategien
* Integration von KI\-Services und Modellen in bestehende Systeme und IT\-Landschaften (inkl. APIs und Datenpipelines)
* Auswahl, Einsatz und Weiterentwicklung von Tools und Frameworks im Bereich AI/LLM (z. B. LangChain, Vektordatenbanken)
* Fachliche Begleitung des Teams als Sparringspartner sowie aktive Mitgestaltung des KI\-Einsatzes im Entwicklungsprozess


 Profil
   

  

* Sehr gute Kenntnisse in .NET / C\#, Python und TypeScript (idealerweise Angular)
* Erfahrung in der Konzeption, Entwicklung und dem Deployment skalierbarer Software\- und KI\-Lösungen
* Praxis in der Umsetzung von KI\-basierten Anwendungen, z. B. RAG\-Systemen und agentischen Workflows
* Erfahrung in der Integration von KI\-Services und Modellen in bestehende Systeme, APIs und Datenpipelines
* Gute Kenntnisse gängiger AI\-/LLM\-Frameworks wie LangChain, LlamaIndex oder vergleichbarer Technologien
* Verständnis für Prompt Engineering, Kontextmanagement, Retrieval\-Strategien sowie idealerweise für Vektordatenbanken und Embedding\-Modelle
* Erfahrung mit AI\-Coding\-Tools wie GitHub Copilot, Codex oder Claude sowie Interesse, deren Einsatz im Entwicklungsprozess aktiv voranzutreiben
* Idealerweise Know\-how in Cloud\- und Hybrid\-Architekturen, idealerweise mit Azure AI Services, Azure AI Foundry oder IBM watsonx
* Teamorientierte, seniorige Persönlichkeit mit Freude an Sparring, Wissensaustausch und der Unterstützung weniger erfahrener KollegInnen


 Angebot
   

  

* Kostenlose Weiterbildung an der BEKO Akademie, individuelle Kurse und Seminare
* Umfangreiches Gesundheitsangebot: Betriebsarzt und Betriebspsychologin, Impfaktionen, Wirbelsäulen\-Screening, uvm.
* Sozialleistungen wie private Unfallversicherung oder diverse Betriebsratsförderungen
* Offene Kommunikation und kurze Entscheidungswege auf allen Ebenen
* Spannende Projekte für namhafte Unternehmen aus unterschiedlichen Branchen
* Gute Erreichbarkeit der BEKO Offices und Kundenstandorte
* Zeitlich und örtlich flexibles Arbeiten in deinem Home Office
* Workation: Ein Monat im Jahr von dort aus arbeiten, wo andere Urlaub machen
* Regelmäßige Mitarbeiterevents (z.B. After Works, Expertenabende, uvm.)
* Vergünstigungen in Gastronomie und Handel
* Kein All\-In\-Vertrag: aufgrund moderner Arbeitszeitmodelle kann flexibel Zeitausgleich konsumiert werden
* Jobradl Bikeleasing – Dienstrad für umweltfreundliche Mobilität
* Das BEKO Sabbatical: Bezahlte Auszeit mit flexibler Planung
* Wir bieten ein Gehalt von mindestens 5\.000,\- € Brutto auf Basis Vollzeit bei Erfüllung aller Anforderungen. Je nach konkreter Qualifikation und Erfahrung ist eine Bereitschaft zur Überzahlung gegeben.

title: Senior AI Engineer (m/f/x)
description:
Intact, the world’s leading provider of software solutions for the Testing, Inspection and Certification (TIC) industry, is looking for an AI Engineer to join our global team. With our products, we help ensure that organic really is organic, food is safe, fisheries are sustainable, and buildings don’t go up in flames.
 



 Intact AI is our production\-grade AI system, used in real audit workflows where correctness, reliability, and traceability matter. The hard part isn’t shipping demos — it’s making LLM\-based systems reliable in complex, document\-heavy environments. If you’ve only worked with clean text inputs, this role will challenge you. We’re looking for a senior engineer who wants to own these systems end\-to\-end, from architecture to production.
 



  





 Sounds good? Then apply now as our next:
 



  





**Senior AI Engineer (m/f/x)** 




  





**Are you READY?** 




 You’ll be our first internal AI Engineer, taking ownership of Intact AI from the external team that built it. You shape architecture and operations from day one.
 



  




* Own \& Evolve: You take production AI systems end\-to\-end architecture, deployment, and operations
* Reliable LLM Systems: You design systems that make RAG and agent\-based workflows reliable under real\-world conditions: quality, hallucination control, structured outputs, latency, cost
* Retrieval \& Reasoning: You continuously improve retrieval and reasoning quality in complex, document\-heavy environments
* Evals \& Guardrails: You define and implement evaluation, monitoring, and guardrails for LLM systems
* Production Optimization: You optimize for latency, cost, and robustness in production
* Incident Ownership: You investigate production issues, fix them at the root, and continuously improve system reliability



  





**Are you the ONE?** 



* You have a strong track record building and operating production systems — not just prototypes
* You drive systems end\-to\-end without close guidance
* You’ve taken ownership of production systems built by others: reading, understanding, and evolving unfamiliar codebases is something you’ve done before
* You’re comfortable working across multiple layers : data, models, APIs, and infrastructure
* You’ve built RAG pipelines in production: chunking, embeddings, retrieval, re\-ranking — and have opinions on what works and what doesn’t
* You’ve built agentic systems that handle multi\-step tasks reliably
* You measure LLM quality systematically: evals, regression tests, monitoring
* You think in systems, not just components
* You can structure ambiguous problems and turn them into working solutions
* You’re strong in Python; production experience on a major cloud platform (Azure preferred) is a plus
* Fluent English required; German a plus



  





**Why US?** 



* International environment with purpose: we help safeguard quality, safety, and sustainability worldwide
* Flexible working hours with flextime, home\-office options \- and the possibility to work
 **predominantly remote within Austria**
* Supportive team: open dialogue across all levels
* Great food options: many partner restaurants nearby offering employee discounts
* Easy to reach: whether by public transport or by car
* Fair compensation: starting at € 4,611 (38\.5h/week), with significant overpayment depending on seniority
* Start: ASAP
company_industry: Software Development and IT Services and IT Consulting

title: Data Engineer - AI Focused (all genders)
description:
TeamViewer provides a leading Digital Workplace platform that connects people with technology—enabling, improving and automating digital processes to make work work better. Our software solutions harness the power of AI and shape the future of digitalization.
   

  

 We believe that our diverse teams and strong company culture are key to the success of our products and technologies, that hundreds of millions of users around the world and around 645,000 customers across all industries rely on. With more than 1,900 employees worldwide, we celebrate the unique perspectives and talents that each individual brings to the table and foster a dynamic work environment where new ideas thrive. Are you ready to join our team and make an impact?
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 We are seeking a skilled and detail\-oriented
 **Data Engineer** 
 to join our growing team. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining the systems that collect, store, and prepare data for analysis across the organization. Your work will serve as the foundation for our data\-driven decision\-making and AI initiatives, making you a key enabler for our analytics and AI teams.
   

  

* Design and implement scalable data models and storage structures to support AI applications, including LLM workflows, retrieval systems (RAG), and feature generation across data warehouses, lakes, and vector databases.
* Build, maintain, and optimize robust data pipelines (ETL/ELT) in Python to ingest, transform, and serve data for both traditional analytics and AI/LLM\-driven use cases.
* Develop and orchestrate end\-to\-end AI data workflows, including ingestion, embedding generation, indexing, and retrieval, using workflow orchestration tools to ensure reliability and performance.
* Implement and manage data retrieval pipelines (e.g., RAG), including chunking strategies, embedding pipelines, vector storage, and query optimization for high\-quality LLM outputs.
* Define and enforce data quality standards across both structured and unstructured data, ensuring integrity, consistency, and relevance for downstream AI applications.
* Build monitoring and observability systems for AI pipelines and LLM interactions, including tracking latency, cost, quality, and failure modes.
* Design and implement CI/CD pipelines for AI systems, enabling automated testing, validation, and safe deployment of changes to data pipelines, prompts, and models.
* Establish and maintain data governance, security, and compliance practices, including access control, encryption, and handling of sensitive data in AI workflows (e.g., GDPR considerations).
* Develop and maintain scalable data and AI platforms that support experimentation, evaluation, and deployment of machine learning and LLM\-based systems.
* Collaborate closely with AI Engineers, Software Engineers, and Product teams to translate business requirements into reliable, production\-ready AI and data solutions.


**Requirements**
 Experience building production\-grade data pipelines and AI systems (as an AI Engineer, ML Engineer, or Data Engineer).
   

  

 Strong Python skills and solid SQL; able to design and implement reliable ETL/ELT workflows.
   

  

 Hands\-on experience with LLM applications, including building and operating RAG pipelines (embeddings, vector stores, retrieval).
   

  

 Familiarity with at least one cloud platform, either GCP or Azure, and relevant data/AI services.
   

  

 Experience with CI/CD and testing for data or AI systems.
   

  

 Practical understanding of monitoring (pipelines and LLM usage: failures, latency, cost, output quality).
   

  

 Comfortable working with Git and collaborative development workflows.
   

  

 Ability to work independently, debug complex systems, and make pragmatic engineering trade\-offs.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* Onsite Onboarding in our HQ office for an optimal start
* An attractive compensation package above the collectively agreed minimum basic salary (according to the IT\-KV, Regelstufe with classification ST1/rule: EUR 3\.724, with ST2/rule: EUR 4\.346 gross/month)
* 28 days of well\-deserved holidays
* Onsite Onboarding in our HQ office for an optimal start
* Great benefits package including company achievement bonus and regular salary reviews
* Special terms for local gyms
* Access to Corporate Benefits platform with many discounts
* Regular team events and company\-wide celebrations
* Open door policy, no dress code rules, frequent all Hands and Leadership Lunches
* Work From Abroad Program allowing up to 40 days of work outside your contracting country
* We celebrate diversity as one of core values, join and drive one of the c\-a\-r\-e initiatives together with us!


 TeamViewer is an equal opportunities employer and is committed to building an inclusive culture where everyone feels welcome and supported. We C\-A\-R\-E and understand that our diverse, values\-driven culture makes us stronger. As we continue to grow as a company, we also focus on enabling our employees to grow both personally and professionally. We are proud to have an open and embracing workplace environment that will empower you to be your best no matter your gender, civil or family status, sexual orientation, religion, age, disability, education level, or race.

title: AI Engineer (m/f/x)
description:
Intact, the world’s leading provider of software solutions for the Testing, Inspection and Certification (TIC) industry, is looking for an AI Engineer to join our global team. With our products, we help ensure that organic really is organic, food is safe, fisheries are sustainable, and buildings don’t go up in flames.
 



 We are building the next generation of AI\-powered tools for the audit industry. Our flagship product, “Intact AI”, is an intelligent assistant that supports auditors in preparing audits, analyzing complex documentation, and working more efficiently. This is only the beginning—our vision is to build intelligent agents for every role in the audit ecosystem. Take the first step into an exciting career and shape the future with us.
 



  





 Sounds good? Then apply now as our next:
 



  





**AI Engineer (m/f/x)** 




  





 You’ll take on a hands‑on engineering role for production‑grade AI systems: you build, debug, and own everything that goes live. Depending on your experience, you start with the level of ownership that fits you – from immediate responsibility for Senior Engineers to a clear, structured growth path for Mid‑Level Engineers. You will quickly become the owner of key components of Intact AI, ramp up efficiently, and actively shape architecture, quality, and operations.
 



  





**Are you READY?** 



* Build \& Ship: You develop features, improvements, and bug fixes for Intact AI (production) and reliably ship them live.
* Agentic workflows: You orchestrate agent workflows (tool use/function calling), ensure structured outputs, and implement validation.
* RAG \& integrations: You build and improve RAG pipelines (chunking/embeddings/retrieval/re\-ranking), integrate APIs, and develop user\-facing features.
* Quality \& operations: You define evals/regression tests, monitor quality/latency/cost, and continuously optimize the systems.
* Incident ownership: You analyze production issues, fix them sustainably, and prevent recurrence.



  





**Are you the ONE?** 



* You bring 4\+ years of software engineering experience (production applications).
* You have hands\-on experience with LLM applications in production (operations/maintenance).
* You know RAG in practice (chunking, embeddings, retrieval, re\-ranking).
* You have experience with agentic systems (orchestration, tool use/function calling) and structured outputs (schemas/validation).
* You are strong in Python; Azure know\-how is a plus.
* You take ownership and debug confidently across multiple components.
* You communicate clearly, document pragmatically, and enjoy working in a team (tech \& product).
* You think analytically, approach ambiguous problems in a structured way, and find fast, clean solutions.
* You are proactive, set priorities wisely, and deliver reliably.
* Excellent English skills are required; German skills are a plus.



  





**Why US?** 



* International environment with purpose: we help safeguard quality, safety, and sustainability worldwide
* Flexible working hours with flextime, home\-office options \- and the possibility to work
 **predominantly remote within Austria**
* Supportive team: open dialogue across all levels
* Great food options: many partner restaurants nearby offering employee discounts
* Easy to reach: whether by public transport or by car
* Fair compensation: starting at € 4,611 (38\.5h/week), with significant overpayment depending on seniority
* Start: ASAP

title: AI Architect
company: Cognitive Group | Part of the Focus Cloud Group
description:
**Job Title**
 AI Architect
   

**Location**
 Germany or Austria
   

**Overview / Role Summary**
 We are seeking an experienced AI Architect to design, govern, and deliver enterprise\-scale AI and machine learning solutions on Microsoft Azure. This pivotal role bridges architecture, data, and applied AI, guiding organizations from strategic inception to robust production\-ready implementations. You will collaborate closely with business stakeholders, engineers, and data scientists to ensure that AI solutions are secure, scalable, responsible, and ultimately aligned with real business outcomes.
   

**Benefits / Value Proposition**
* Competitive salary and performance bonuses
* Comprehensive health benefits package
* Opportunities for professional development and training
* Flexible working hours and remote work options
* A culture that encourages innovation and collaboration


**Key Responsibilities**
* Architect end\-to\-end AI solutions on Microsoft Azure, managing everything from data ingestion to model deployment and monitoring.
* Define and own AI reference architectures, design patterns, and industry best practices.
* Lead the design of solutions utilizing services such as Azure OpenAI, Azure Machine Learning, Azure AI Services (Cognitive Services), and Azure Data Factory.
* Guide responsible and ethical AI adoption, maintaining a focus on governance, security, and compliance.
* Collaborate with engineering teams to implement MLOps and DevOps practices for model production.
* Translate business requirements into actionable technical AI architectures and roadmaps.
* Support pre\-sales and solution shaping activities, which include technical workshops and architecture evaluations.
* Mentor engineers and architects on AI strategies, tooling, and the evolving capabilities of Azure.


**Required Experience \& Skills**
* Must have strong hands\-on experience designing solutions on Microsoft Azure.
* Required background in AI/ML architecture, encompassing both traditional machine learning and generative AI workloads.
* Must possess experience with Azure OpenAI, large language model (LLM) integration, and MLOps pipelines (CI/CD, model versioning, monitoring).
* Mandatory knowledge of data platforms and analytics architectures.
* Necessary understanding of cloud security, identity management, networking, and governance.
* Ability to communicate complex technical concepts effectively to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Minimum experience working in enterprise or regulated environments.


**Dealbreakers (Non\-Negotiable Requirements)**
* Legal work eligibility in the relevant jurisdiction.
* Mandatory certifications in Microsoft Azure or related fields.
* Required years of experience in AI architecture roles.
* Essential technical proficiency in Azure and AI services.


**Desirable / Nice\-to\-Have Skills**
* Microsoft certifications (e.g., Azure Solutions Architect, Azure AI Engineer).
* Experience with prompt engineering, RAG patterns, and AI copilots.
* Exposure to Power Platform, Dynamics 365, or Microsoft 365 Copilot extensibility.
* Background in consultancy, professional services, or solution delivery roles.


**Application Call to Action**
 If you are a forward\-thinking AI Architect ready to make a significant impact with your expertise in Microsoft Azure, we encourage you to apply today. Join us in shaping the future of AI solutions that drive measurable business value!
